scripts.test: cd .. && bun run --filter @almirant/api test && bun run --filter @almirant/config test && bun run --filter @almirant/database test && bun run --filter @almirant/i18n test && bun run --filter @almirant/remote-agent test && bun run --filter @almirant/shared test && bun run --filter @almirant/stream-consumer test
scripts.test:watch: cd .. && bun run --filter @almirant/api test:watch && bun run --filter @almirant/config test:watch && bun run --filter @almirant/database test:watch && bun run --filter @almirant/i18n test:watch && bun run --filter @almirant/remote-agent test:watch && bun run --filter @almirant/shared test:watch && bun run --filter @almirant/stream-consumer test:watch
scripts.type-check: cd .. && bun run --filter @almirant/api type-check && bun run --filter @almirant/config type-check && bun run --filter @almirant/database typecheck && bun run --filter @almirant/i18n type-check && bun run --filter @almirant/remote-agent type-check && bun run --filter @almirant/shared type-check && bun run --filter @almirant/stream-consumer type-check && bun run --filter @almirant/worker type-check
